name: IdsEdwDntlCatDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_1 AS (SELECT D.DNTL_CAT_SK, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD, 'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, D.DNTL_CAT_ID, D.DNTL_CAT_DESC, D.WARN_MSG_SEQ_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.DNTL_CAT D LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON D.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK), cte_2 AS (SELECT DNTL_CAT_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, DNTL_CAT_ID, DNTL_CAT_DESC, WARN_MSG_SEQ_NO, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_1) SELECT DNTL_CAT_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, DNTL_CAT_ID, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, DNTL_CAT_DESC, WARN_MSG_SEQ_NO AS DNTL_CAT_WARN_MSG_SEQ_NO, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_2

This is Source extract data from an IDS table and apply Code denormalization, create a load ready file.

Job Name:
IdsEdwDntlCatDExtr

Table:
DNTL_CAT_D
Read from source table DNTL_CAT from IDS ;
Pull records based on LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK
This is a load ready file conforms to the target table structure

Write DNTL_CAT_D Data into a Sequential file for Load Job.
